title: chore(deps): update webdriverio monorepo

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>webdriverio/webdriverio</summary>

### [`v5.23.0`](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/releases/v5.23.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/v5.22.4...v5.23.0)

#### v5.23.0 (2020-05-25)

##### :rocket: New Feature

-   `wdio-sync`, `webdriverio`
    -   [#​5282](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5282) Allow relative drag&drop arguments ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))

##### :bug: Bug Fix

-   `devtools`
    -   [#​5350](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5350) devtools package: fix switchToFrame function ([@​takeya0x86](https://togithub.com/takeya0x86))
    -   [#​5280](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5280) Support mobile emulation capability in DevTools package ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))
-   `webdriver`, `webdriverio`
    -   [#​5279](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5279) Script fixes for IE ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))
-   `wdio-appium-service`
    -   [#​5268](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5268) Fix Appium service port assignment ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))

##### :nail_care: Polish

-   `wdio-spec-reporter`
    -   [#​5390](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5390) Fix browser version in spec reporter ([@​unickq](https://togithub.com/unickq))
-   `wdio-cli`
    -   [#​5145](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5145) Forward service defined path (driver server endpoint) for Selenium server. ([@​kapoorlakshya](https://togithub.com/kapoorlakshya))

##### :memo: Documentation

-   [#​5421](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5421) Added subrountine shapes where applicable ([@​jdavis61](https://togithub.com/jdavis61))
-   [#​5403](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5403) Docs: Update TypeScript.md ([@​osmolyar](https://togithub.com/osmolyar))
-   [#​5402](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/5402) Fix class syntax in CustomServices.md ([@​pmdartus](https://togithub.com/pmdartus))

##### Committers: 8

-   Christian Bromann ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))
-   James Davis ([@​jdavis61](https://togithub.com/jdavis61))
-   Lakshya Kapoor ([@​kapoorlakshya](https://togithub.com/kapoorlakshya))
-   Nick ([@​unickq](https://togithub.com/unickq))
-   Nikita Pankratov ([@​nikita-pankratov](https://togithub.com/nikita-pankratov))
-   Olga ([@​osmolyar](https://togithub.com/osmolyar))
-   Pierre-Marie Dartus ([@​pmdartus](https://togithub.com/pmdartus))
-   Takeshi Kishi ([@​takeya0x86](https://togithub.com/takeya0x86))
